description_long: This sports car features an aggressive aerodynamic design with a low, wide stance and pronounced fender flares. The front end is equipped with a prominent splitter and a large hood vent, while the rear showcases a substantial spoiler and dual exhaust outlets. The body is predominantly white with black accents, including the hood, window trim, and wheels. The side profile reveals sculpted side skirts, vented fenders, and sleek, flush-mounted door handles. The wheels are dark-colored with a multi-spoke design and visible red brake calipers. The overall appearance is that of a high-performance, track-oriented vehicle, likely inspired by classic American muscle cars with modern racing modifications.
description: A white, aggressively styled sports car with a large rear spoiler, black accents, and multi-spoke wheels, featuring aerodynamic enhancements and a muscular stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide stance, large front splitter, hood vent, and aggressive aerodynamic features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted side skirts, vented fenders, flush door handle, and multi-spoke wheels with red brake calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large rear spoiler, dual exhaust outlets, and distinctive taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same aerodynamic side features and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke black alloy wheels with visible red brake calipers
